calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via Zoom, for Deanna Yee, Administrator.

The court points to the issue with the Administrator not fully insuring estate funds in observance of FDIC limits and of issue of the insufficient bond. Ms. Ng offers advocacy on behalf of her client's decision not to insure the estate funds and reports of waivers filed by her client's brother and asks the court to waive the FDCI requirement and approve the petition for distribution.

After brief, additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. William Barry. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
